constitutional_invariant.llm_proposes: Provider-originated proposals remain upstream and non-authoritative.
constitutional_invariant.aigol_governs: AiGOL validates invocation, dispatch, assignment, worker identity, and chain continuity before EXECUTING.
constitutional_invariant.worker_executes: Execution is represented only as an execution-start state in this runtime.
constitutional_invariant.replay_records: Execution start and return events are persisted as append-only replay artifacts.

known_limits: Failure handling beyond fail-closed validation is not implemented.
The runtime records execution start only.
